name: Appetizer Meatballs
recipeIngredient: Egg Beaters® 99% egg substitute -- equal to 1 egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground round, Egg Beaters® 99% egg substitute (equal to 1 egg), bread crumbs, skim milk, finely chopped onion, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
3. In a skillet over medium heat, brown the meatballs and drain excess oil.
4. Place the meatballs in a 2 1/2-quart baking dish.
5. Combine the sauce ingredients (ketchup, chopped onion, sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper) in a separate bowl.
6. Pour the sauce over the meatballs.
7. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 50-60 minutes or until the meatballs are cooked through.
Serving Size: 3 meatballs
Calories: 85
Total Fat: 3gm (26% of calories from fat)
Saturated Fat: 1gm
Cholesterol: 24mg
Sodium: 199mg
Carbohydrate: 9gm
Protein: 8gm
